name: Fuvesleves (Herb Soup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook all the herbs in 2 tablespoons butter for 2-3 minutes.
2. Sprinkle with flour, then stir and cook another 4 minutes. Set aside.
3. Pour 6 cups water into a pot and bring to a slow simmer. Add salt and pepper.
4. Mix egg yolks, sour cream, and remaining butter; whisk into the simmering soup.
5. Cook soup over low heat, stirring until it thickens. Add herbs and simmer another few minutes.
6. Place half of a toasted roll in a soup plate and ladle soup over it.
